name: 11ai-docker-operations
description: Modular, safety-first skills for common Docker CLI and Compose operations.

interface.shortDescription: Run common Docker tasks safely and clearly.
interface.longDescription: A modular toolbox for inspecting Docker, managing containers and images, using Compose, building and publishing images, managing storage, cleaning up safely, and troubleshooting failures.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the 11ai-docker-operations skills for this Docker task.
